title: Fix gpclub.vn homepage freeze
description: Fix gpclub.vn homepage freeze by lazy-loading public engagement widgets, deduplicating catalog fetches with React Query, deferring chat data until open, and limiting popup queries

title: Rich editor + HTML output + sanitize render
description: Replace the raw HTML product detail textarea with a rich editor for non-HTML-savvy admins, keep output as HTML, and sanitize product detail rendering on public pages.
